component.name: Ayuz
component.summary: Unofficial Control Center for Asus Laptops

description.p: Ayuz is a lightweight, native Linux control center for Asus laptops (like Zenbook, Vivobook, and ROG). It allows you to tweak deep hardware settings that are usually only available on Windows.
This is a community package and is not officially supported by ASUS.

ul.li: Battery Care: Set charging limits to 80% to prolong battery lifespan.
Fan Profiles: Switch between Whisper, Balanced, and Performance modes.
OLED Care: Manage pixel refresh and panel dimming.
Keyboard Backlight: Configure sleep timeouts and auto-brightness.

screenshot.caption: The system overview and battery settings

description.p: Bug fix release for ambient light backlight synchronization issues.

Bug fix release. The keyboard backlight no longer switches on behind the lock screen when the ambient light changes while the session is locked. The ambient automation now re-evaluates the current light level as soon as the session is unlocked.
Added NumberPad support for ExpertBook laptops and fixed GTK layer-shell handling.
Added COSMIC desktop support for display features and NumberPad support for illuminated keypads. Fixed brightness synchronization and a COSMIC crash.
Added a 5x4 NumberPad layout with a macro engine and a top-right corner touch function. Fixed NumLock and kernel-blocked process issues.
Moved the AniMatrix LED panel controls to a separate tab.
Added an Fn key toggle and single-zone Aura keyboard lighting support, along with several refactors and bug fixes.
Fixed the AppImage path for the AniMatrix feature and applied minor documentation updates.

Added AniMatrix LED panel controls for ROG laptops with an AniMatrix display. Includes power toggle, brightness, built-in animation selection, power behavior settings, and a GIF gallery with 34 bundled ASUS animations.
Switched RPM packaging from cargo-generate-rpm to cargo-rpm.
Added profiles feature. Users can now create, rename, and delete configuration profiles. Settings are automatically saved to the currently active profile.
Bug fix release. Fixed autostart not working on KDE Plasma.
Initial release of Ayuz for Linux.
